title: IDBI Bank Part Time Doctor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
org: Industrial Development Bank of India (IDBI Bank)
shortInfo: Industrial Development Bank of India (IDBI Bank) Part Time Doctor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IDBI Bank. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the IDBI Bank Part Time Doctor Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 67 years who have MBBS/MD qualification from a recognized University/College approved by the Medical Council of India in Allopathic system of medicine are eligible to apply for these Part Time Doctor vacancies. age_limit.details: All Posts: Maximum age limit is 67 years.

qualification.details: Part Time Doctor: MBBS/MD from any recognized University/College approved by Medical Council of India in Allopathic system of medicine. Applicant having MD – Medicine qualifications would be preferred.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Part Time Doctor - Mumbai, Cuffe Parade
Part Time Doctor - Nerul, Navi Mumbai
Part Time Doctor - Ahmedabad, CG Road

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IDBI Bank Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 06-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IDBI Bank Part Time Doctor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Part Time Doctor posts is 06-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Part Time Doctor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Part Time Doctor positions announced by IDBI Bank.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS/MD degree from a recognized University/College approved by the Medical Council of India in the Allopathic system of medicine. Preference will be given to those with MD – Medicine qualifications.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Part Time Doctor posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Part Time Doctor posts is 67 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Part Time Doctor position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 1000/- per hour for the Part Time Doctor position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the IDBI Bank Part Time Doctor recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Part Time Doctor posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Part Time Doctor posts will be based on a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Which locations are covered under this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment covers locations in Mumbai (Cuffe Parade), Nerul (Navi Mumbai), and Ahmedabad (CG Road).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will direct you to the relevant resources.
